title: I have created a board and a kanban view and when i tried to fetch the views of the board using GraphQL It returns empty array but i am preety sure that i have the kanban view for the board
excerpt:
curl -X POST https://api.monday.com/v2 \ 

-H "Authorization: Bearer “”  
-H “Content-Type: application/json”  
-d ‘{“query”: “query { boards (ids: 1873868446) { views { type settings_str view_specific_data_str name id }…

posts.author: Kasim (Kasim)
posts.cookedHtml:
curl -X POST https://api.monday.com/v2 \

-H "Authorization: Bearer “”
-H “Content-Type: application/json”
-d ‘{“query”: “query { boards (ids: 1873868446) { views { type settings_str view_specific_data_str name id } } }”}’
{“data”:{“boards”:[{“views”:}]},“account_id”:23348699}

here is the curl

and in the API playground
{
“data”: {
“boards”: [
{
“views”: [
{
“name”: “Broadcast”,
“id”: “39713302”,
“type”: “SppBoardView”
}
]
}
]
},
“account_id”: 23348699
}
i am not getting Kanban view

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Kasim and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, our API can not retrieve native monday views such as Kanban, Chart or Calendar.

That is why you are not seeing your Kanban view.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
